name: Joint Venture Agreement Extraction Schema
description: Joint Venture Agreement - governs formation, governance, capital contributions, IP rights, operations, and exit mechanisms for a jointly owned business venture between two or more parties

venture_formation.description: Core formation details of the joint venture including entity structure, jurisdiction, and business purpose

agreement_title.description: Official title of the joint venture agreement

jv_entity_name.description: Legal name of the joint venture entity to be formed or operating name of the venture

entity_type.description: Legal form of the joint venture entity

formation_jurisdiction.description: State, province, or country where the JV entity is formed or registered

effective_date.description: Date the joint venture agreement becomes effective

signing_date.description: Date the agreement was executed by the parties

business_purpose.description: Primary business purpose, objectives, and scope of activities for the joint venture

registered_address.description: Principal office or registered address of the joint venture entity

territory_of_operations.description: Geographic territory or markets in which the joint venture is authorized to operate

regulatory_approvals_required.description: List of governmental or regulatory approvals required before the JV can commence operations

conditions_precedent.description: Conditions that must be satisfied before the JV becomes effective or closes

parties_and_contributions.description: Details of each JV partner including identity, contributions of capital, IP, and other assets, and valuation methodology

jv_partners.description: List of all parties forming the joint venture with their details and contributions

legal_name.description: Full legal name of the JV partner

short_name.description: Short name or defined term used throughout the agreement

entity_type.description: Legal entity type of the partner (e.g., corporation, LLC, GmbH)

jurisdiction_of_incorporation.description: State or country where the JV partner is incorporated or organized

address.description: Principal business address of the JV partner

authorized_representative.description: Name and title of the person authorized to act on behalf of the JV partner

capital_contributions.description: Detailed breakdown of each partner's capital contributions to the JV

ip_contribution_description.description: Description of intellectual property contributed (patents, trade secrets, know-how, software)

ip_contribution_valuation.description: Agreed monetary valuation of the IP contribution
extraction_hints: appraised value of the intellectual property

asset_contribution_description.description: Description of physical or tangible assets contributed (equipment, real estate, inventory)

asset_contribution_valuation.description: Agreed monetary valuation of the contributed assets

services_contribution_description.description: Description of services, personnel, or expertise contributed in lieu of cash

total_contribution_value.description: Total agreed value of all contributions from this partner

contribution_schedule.description: Timeline or milestones for making the contributions

valuation_methodology.description: Method used to value non-cash contributions (independent appraisal, agreed value, book value)

total_jv_capitalization.description: Total initial capitalization of the joint venture from all partners combined

capitalization_currency.description: Currency of the total JV capitalization

ownership_and_governance.description: Equity ownership percentages, board composition, voting rights, management committee structure, and officer appointments

equity_split.description: Ownership percentage or equity interest allocated to each JV partner

ownership_percentage.description: Percentage of equity ownership in the JV

share_class.description: Class of shares or units held if applicable

board_composition.description: Structure and composition of the JV board of directors or governing board

total_board_seats.description: Total number of seats on the JV board of directors

seat_allocation.description: Number of board seats allocated to each partner

partner_name.description: Name of the partner entitled to appoint directors

independent_directors.description: Number of independent or mutually agreed directors on the board

chairperson_appointment.description: Which partner appoints the chairperson and any rotation provisions

board_meeting_frequency.description: How often board meetings are required to be held

board_quorum.description: Quorum requirement for valid board meetings
extraction_hints: present in person or by proxy

voting_rights.description: Voting thresholds and mechanisms for JV decision-making

ordinary_resolution_threshold.description: Voting threshold for ordinary business decisions

special_resolution_threshold.description: Voting threshold for significant or extraordinary decisions

partner_veto_rights.description: Matters over which individual partners hold veto rights
extraction_hints: shall not without the consent of

reserved_matters.description: List of significant decisions requiring unanimous consent or supermajority approval

management_committee.description: Structure of any management or operating committee below the board level

exists.description: Whether a management committee is established

composition.description: How the management committee is composed and members appointed

authority_scope.description: Scope of authority delegated to the management committee

meeting_frequency.description: How often the management committee meets

officer_appointments.description: Key officer positions in the JV and which partner has the right to appoint each

position.description: Officer title (CEO, CFO, COO, General Manager, etc.)

appointing_partner.description: Name of the partner with the right to appoint this officer

appointment_term.description: Term of office and any rotation provisions for this position

anti_dilution_protection.description: Provisions protecting partners from dilution of their ownership interest

financial_management.description: Funding obligations, banking arrangements, accounting standards, profit and loss allocation, and distribution policies

additional_funding_obligations.description: Whether and how partners may be required to make additional capital contributions beyond initial commitments

failure_to_fund_consequences.description: Consequences if a partner fails to meet a capital call or funding obligation

banking_arrangements.description: Requirements for JV bank accounts, signatory authority, and cash management

accounting_standards.description: Accounting standards or framework used by the JV for financial reporting

fiscal_year_end.description: End date of the JV's fiscal year

profit_allocation_method.description: Formula or method for allocating profits among JV partners

loss_allocation_method.description: Formula or method for allocating losses among JV partners

distribution_policy.description: Policy governing when and how profits are distributed to partners

distribution_waterfall.description: Priority order or waterfall for distributing JV proceeds to partners

minimum_cash_reserve.description: Minimum cash reserve or working capital the JV must maintain before making distributions

budget_approval_process.description: Process for preparing and approving the annual operating budget and capital budget

audit_requirements.description: Requirements for financial audits, appointment of auditors, and audit frequency

financial_reporting_obligations.description: Required financial reports and their delivery schedule to JV partners

report_type.description: Type of financial report (e.g., monthly P&L, quarterly balance sheet, annual audited statements)

frequency.description: How often the report must be delivered

delivery_deadline.description: Deadline for delivering the report after the reporting period ends

tax_treatment.description: Tax treatment and elections for the JV entity (pass-through, entity-level, tax partnership)

transfer_pricing_provisions.description: Rules for pricing transactions between the JV and its partners or their affiliates

operations.description: Scope of operations, business plan requirements, key personnel commitments, and non-compete restrictions

scope_of_operations.description: Permitted and restricted business activities of the joint venture

business_plan_requirement.description: Requirements for developing and maintaining a JV business plan

initial_plan_required.description: Whether an initial business plan must be adopted at formation

update_frequency.description: How often the business plan must be updated

approval_process.description: Who must approve the business plan and any changes

key_personnel.description: Key personnel that partners are required to make available or assign to the JV

role.description: Position or role of the key person

providing_partner.description: Partner responsible for providing this person

commitment_type.description: Whether the person is full-time, part-time, or advisory

replacement_provisions.description: Process for replacing a key person who departs

secondment_provisions.description: Terms for partners seconding employees to the JV including costs, duration, and reporting lines

non_compete_restrictions.description: Restrictions on partners competing with the JV during the term

scope.description: Activities or markets in which partners are restricted from competing

geographic_scope.description: Geographic area covered by the non-compete

exceptions.description: Permitted activities or carve-outs from the non-compete

non_solicitation_restrictions.description: Restrictions on partners soliciting JV employees, customers, or suppliers

exclusivity_obligations.description: Whether the JV is the exclusive vehicle for the partners in the defined business scope

reporting_to_partners.description: Operational reporting obligations of JV management to the partners

intellectual_property.description: Background IP rights, foreground IP ownership, licensing arrangements, and IP treatment upon termination

background_ip.description: Pre-existing intellectual property each partner contributes or makes available to the JV

partner_name.description: Name of the partner owning the background IP

ip_description.description: Description of the background IP (patents, trademarks, trade secrets, software, know-how)

ownership_retained.description: Whether the partner retains ownership of their background IP

license_to_jv.description: Nature of the license granted to the JV for this background IP (exclusive, non-exclusive, royalty-free)

foreground_ip_ownership.description: Ownership rules for intellectual property created by or within the joint venture during its term

improvement_ip.description: Ownership and rights to improvements made to a partner's background IP during the JV

ip_licensing_to_partners.description: License rights granted back to partners for JV-developed IP during and after the venture

ip_licensing_to_third_parties.description: Rules governing licensing of JV IP to third parties

ip_registration_responsibility.description: Which party is responsible for filing and maintaining IP registrations (patents, trademarks)

ip_protection_obligations.description: Obligations regarding protection of JV intellectual property including enforcement against infringement

ip_ownership_upon_termination.description: How JV-developed IP is allocated or divided among partners upon dissolution or termination

confidential_information.description: Treatment of confidential information exchanged between partners and the JV

definition.description: Definition of what constitutes confidential information

survival_period.description: How long confidentiality obligations survive after termination of the JV

transfer_and_exit.description: Transfer restrictions on JV interests, rights of first refusal, tag-along/drag-along rights, and put/call option mechanisms

transfer_restrictions.description: General restrictions on transferring, assigning, or encumbering JV interests

permitted_transfers.description: Transfers that are permitted without consent (e.g., to affiliates, subsidiaries)

lock_up_period_months.description: Minimum period during which partners cannot transfer their JV interests

right_of_first_refusal.description: Right of existing partners to purchase interests before they are offered to third parties

exists.description: Whether a right of first refusal exists

notice_period_days.description: Number of days the selling partner must give notice before selling to a third party

exercise_period_days.description: Number of days the non-selling partner has to exercise the ROFR

matching_right.description: Whether the non-selling partner can match a third-party offer

right_of_first_offer.description: Right of a partner to make the first offer to purchase before the selling partner solicits third parties

tag_along_rights.description: Right of minority partners to participate in a sale by a majority partner on the same terms

threshold_percentage.description: Ownership threshold that triggers tag-along rights
extraction_hints: if a partner holding more than

terms.description: Key terms and conditions of the tag-along right

drag_along_rights.description: Right of majority partners to compel minority partners to join in a sale of the entire JV

threshold_percentage.description: Ownership threshold required to exercise drag-along rights

minimum_price_protection.description: Any minimum price or valuation floor protecting the dragged partner

put_option.description: Right of a partner to require the other partner(s) or the JV to purchase their interest

trigger_events.description: Events that trigger the put option

exercise_price_methodology.description: How the put option exercise price is determined

call_option.description: Right of a partner to require another partner to sell their interest

trigger_events.description: Events that trigger the call option

exercise_price_methodology.description: How the call option exercise price is determined

shotgun_buy_sell.description: Whether a shotgun or Russian roulette buy-sell mechanism exists for resolving deadlocks or exits

term_and_dissolution.description: Duration of the JV, events triggering dissolution, winding up procedures, and post-dissolution asset distribution

initial_term.description: Initial duration or term of the joint venture

renewal_provisions.description: Whether and how the JV term may be extended or renewed

termination_for_convenience.description: Right of a partner to terminate the JV without cause

permitted.description: Whether termination for convenience is allowed

notice_period_days.description: Days of advance notice required for convenience termination

minimum_term_before_exit.description: Minimum period the JV must operate before a convenience termination is allowed

termination_for_cause_events.description: Events or defaults that entitle a partner to terminate the JV for cause

cure_period_days.description: Number of days a defaulting partner has to cure a breach before termination may occur

dissolution_triggers.description: Events that automatically trigger dissolution of the JV

winding_up_procedures.description: Process and responsibilities for winding up JV affairs after dissolution

winding_up_period.description: Maximum time allowed for completing the winding up process

asset_distribution_upon_dissolution.description: Priority order and method for distributing JV assets to partners upon dissolution

post_termination_non_compete.description: Non-compete restrictions that apply to partners after the JV is terminated or dissolved

duration_months.description: Duration of the post-termination non-compete period in months

geographic_scope.description: Geographic area covered by the post-termination non-compete

restricted_activities.description: Activities from which partners are restricted after termination

survival_clauses.description: Provisions of the agreement that survive its termination or expiration

dispute_resolution.description: Governing law, dispute resolution mechanisms including mediation, arbitration, and deadlock resolution procedures

governing_law.description: Jurisdiction whose laws govern the interpretation and enforcement of the agreement

dispute_resolution_method.description: Primary method for resolving disputes between JV partners

escalation_procedure.description: Internal escalation steps required before formal dispute resolution

initial_resolution_level.description: First level of internal discussion (e.g., project managers, management committee)

senior_executive_escalation.description: Escalation to senior executives or CEOs if initial resolution fails

escalation_period_days.description: Number of days for each level of internal escalation before proceeding to formal resolution

mediation_provisions.description: Requirements for mediation as a step in dispute resolution

required.description: Whether mediation is a mandatory step before arbitration or litigation

mediation_body.description: Institution or organization administering the mediation

mediation_location.description: Location where mediation proceedings will take place

mediation_period_days.description: Maximum days allowed for the mediation process

arbitration_seat.description: Seat or legal place of arbitration

language_of_arbitration.description: Language in which arbitration proceedings are conducted

number_of_arbitrators.description: Number of arbitrators on the arbitral panel

arbitrator_selection_method.description: How arbitrators are selected or appointed

binding.description: Whether the arbitration award is final and binding

deadlock_resolution.description: Mechanism for resolving deadlocks in JV governance (board or partner level)

definition_of_deadlock.description: How a deadlock is defined under the agreement

resolution_steps.description: Sequential steps for resolving a deadlock

ultimate_remedy.description: Final remedy if the deadlock cannot be resolved (e.g., buy-sell, dissolution, expert determination)

deadlock_resolution_period_days.description: Total number of days allowed for the entire deadlock resolution process

expert_determination.description: Provisions for using an independent expert to resolve specific technical or valuation disputes

interim_relief.description: Rights of parties to seek interim or injunctive relief from courts notwithstanding arbitration clauses
